pkgmetadata.longdescription: aiml implements an interpreter for AIML, the Artificial IntelligenceMarkup Language developed by Dr. Richard Wallace of the A.L.I.C.E. Foundation.It can be used to implement a conversational AI program.Forked from 0.9.1 httpsgithub.compaulovnpython-aiml 0.8.6 httpsgithub.comcdwfspyaimlPyAIML (c) Cort Stratton
